name: Credit Counseling Center
description_short: Unable to verify company details due to website access restrictions (403 Forbidden error). Categorized as non-profit credit counseling based on domain and current classification.
description_long:
Credit Counseling Center is listed as a non-profit credit counseling organization and is currently categorized within the free-help sector, which typically includes HUD-approved housing counselors and NFCC-certified credit counseling agencies. However, verification of their actual services, credentials, and operations cannot be completed due to a 403 Forbidden access error on their website (https://creditcounselingcenter.org/), which prevents review of their service offerings, certifications, and operational details.

Based on their categorization and domain name, they likely offer credit counseling services typical of non-profit agencies, which may include budgeting assistance, debt management plans, and financial education. However, specific services cannot be confirmed from available website content.

Without access to their website, distinguishing factors such as counselor credentials, geographic service areas, specific program offerings, and organizational partnerships cannot be documented or verified.

CONSUMER CAUTION: This organization's website is currently inaccessible, which prevents verification of their legitimacy, certification status (NFCC, HUD approval), or current operations. Consumers should independently verify any non-profit's credentials through NFCC.org or HUD.gov before engaging services. The website access issue raises questions about current operational status.
pros: Categorized as free-help/non-profit (typically no-cost services if verified as legitimate)
cons: Website returns 403 Forbidden error — cannot verify current operations
No accessible information about counselor credentials or certifications
No verifiable contact information, service areas, or program details available
Unable to confirm NFCC certification or HUD approval status
Website access issues may indicate operational problems or abandonment
diagnosis: Credit Counseling Center cannot be evaluated as a viable resource at this time due to website inaccessibility. Before using any credit counseling service, verify non-profit status through NFCC.org or HUD.gov and confirm counselor certifications directly with those agencies.
